design_philosophy: Enterprise-grade, Stripe-inspired high-contrast borders, Notion-inspired typography clarity. Professional, dense, and highly functional control-room feel. Full RTL support.

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: fixed top-0 right-0 w-64 h-screen border-s border-border bg-surface flex flex-col z-40 (Note: right-0 is used because of RTL)
layout_and_spacing.main_content: min-h-screen bg-background text-text_main transition-colors duration-200 lg:pe-64 w-full flex flex-col
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - Dense bento layouts: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.cards: bg-background border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous inner padding for cards: p-6
layout_and_spacing.alignment: RTL Native - Use logical properties like text-start, text-end, ms-*, me-*, ps-*, pe-*

components.buttons: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 h-9 px-4 py-2
components.inputs: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-border bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
components.tables: w-full caption-bottom text-sm text-start. Header border-b border-border. Rows hover:bg-surface transition-colors data-testid required
components.badges: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2
components.testing: MUST add data-testid to all interactive components

login_background_light.description: Abstract white geometric shapes for light mode login background

login_background_dark.description: Dark geometric forms in dramatic lighting for dark mode login

empty_state_illustration.description: Close-up of disassembled smartphone parts for empty state or onboarding illustration

icons.rtl_behavior: Mirror directional icons (arrows, chevrons) with 'transform scale-x-[-1]'

accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-btn')
accessibility.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. Dark mode borders must be visible (#27272A).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup RTL properly: Add `dir='rtl'` to the `<html>` tag in index.html.

2. Use Logical CSS Properties: ALWAYS use Tailwind's logical properties (ps-*, pe-*, ms-*, me-*, border-s, border-e, text-start, text-end) instead of pl-*, pr-*, etc. This ensures perfect LTR/RTL flipping.
3. Sidebar placement: Due to RTL, fix the sidebar to the right. Main content should have a padding/margin-end (`pe-64` or `me-64`) instead of margin-left to avoid overlap.
4. Typography: Import 'IBM Plex Sans Arabic' in the main CSS file and configure Tailwind to use it as the primary sans font.
6. Apply a high-contrast 'Swiss' aesthetic: Avoid soft shadows. Rely on crisp 1px borders for cards and tables. Background should be stark white (light mode) or deep obsidian (dark mode).
7. Data Density: Dashboards should use tight spacing (Control Room Grid) to display lots of information (Debts, Maintenance tickets, Inventory).
8. Global Search: Implement a Command Palette style global search (Linear/Notion vibe) using Shadcn's Command component.
9. Use Lucide icons. Remember to apply `scale-x-[-1]` or use standard directional classes for icons that need mirroring in RTL (like back/forward arrows).
10. MUST include `data-testid` on all buttons, links, inputs, and forms to ensure testing reliability.
